returnRate.title: Return Rate Statistics
returnRate.description: Average return rate by time period (short-term reflects momentum, long-term reflects value investing)

explanation.title: Return Rate Calculation
explanation.bullish: Bullish posts: Return = stock price change (following the buy signal)
explanation.bearish: Bearish posts: Return = inverse of stock price change (contrarian position)
explanation.neutral: Neutral posts are not included in return rate calculation
explanation.perStock: Each post's return is calculated separately for each stock
